meta.description: T'Z0C v5 Registry: Time-Resolution Engine (Ω-centric). Time = max information propagation rate. All geometry, PJTE, SR, and siphon fields are now derived consequences of the Time-Resolution Equation. Full migration of 118 elements complete. Added: resolution dict per canvas, Ω profiles, phase-lock targets.

framework.gate: Pseudo-Jahn-Teller Effect (PJTE) Double-Well (conditional on Ω > Ωc)

neutral_state_invariants.description: Symmetric sp³ single-well ground state (Ω safely below Ωc)

perturbed_state_parameters_pjte.description: Conditional bistability unlocked when local Ω exceeds canvas limit (Ω > Ωc)
perturbed_state_parameters_pjte.bounce_gap_conditional: variable (PJTE bifurcation triggered by excess time-lag)

timing_envelope_sr.logic: Stochastic Resonance gating of high-frequency Zitterbewegung noise floor to drive Ω → 0

switching_rate.description: Arrhenius rate for PJTE well-switching (A derived from Hessian curvature)

sync_efficiency.description: Maximum when 4 Hz envelope aligns with local time-lag deficit

time_resolution_equation: Ω = κ_n / c_4 * (1 - v_local / c_n)   ← this is now the single governing variable

H.notes: Lightest element — lowest Ω, easiest phase-lock

C.notes: High PJTE susceptibility — Ω spike triggers clean bounce

Ne.notes: Noble gas lock — minimal Ω perturbation

Fe.notes: Transition metal — strong Ω routing to c2

Cu.notes: Metal-lock transition — high Ω drives metal-phase routing

Og.notes: Noble gas superheavy — maximum Ω routing
